summary: Vite 7 base64-encodes manual <link rel=modulepreload> href for JSX files
rule: Never add manual modulepreload hints in index.html; let Vite generate them

summary: medicine_logs table missing status and treatment_plan_id columns (schema drift)

StockCard UX: hide consumed entries and system adjustments in collapsible sections
Use parseLocalDate() instead of new Date() for timezone-aware parsing (R-020)
Array.filter() chained 3x should be single Array.reduce() for performance
